name: Twitter Card Generator
safety_framing_observed: Independent Twitter/X metadata drafting; truthful previews; no affiliation; no rendering ranking click-through approval or engagement guarantees; cache and field validation guidance present.
remaining_risk: Medium platform and metadata misuse risk remains: misleading previews, stale cache assumptions, fake handles, or implied platform endorsement.
indexing_recommendation: Do not index in this micro-batch; keep noindex until a separate indexing batch explicitly reviews it.
review_notes: Closest of the three for a future indexing batch because it is primarily a developer/SEO utility with strong field-level and limitation framing.

name: Responsible YouTube Hook Generator
safety_framing_observed: Responsible hook framing; anti-clickbait guidance; no misleading titles thumbnails fake proof scams spam misinformation or performance guarantees; output includes safety note.
remaining_risk: Medium platform/content risk remains: attention manipulation, clickbait pressure, unsupported claims, or implied views retention ranking monetization or growth outcomes.
indexing_recommendation: Do not index in this micro-batch; keep noindex until a separate indexing batch explicitly reviews it.
review_notes: Usable future candidate only after confirming the visible page keeps anti-clickbait and no-performance-guarantee language prominent.

name: Sample Placeholder Text Generator
safety_framing_observed: Renamed/reframed as sample placeholder text; fictional demo-copy language; prohibits deception impersonation fraud fake evidence fake reviews fake conversations official records and verified-real claims.
remaining_risk: Higher fake-identity/document/message misuse risk remains because the primary keyword still includes fake text and output can resemble messages or document copy.
indexing_recommendation: Keep noindex; do not recommend for the next indexing batch.
review_notes: Retain as a safe utility for mockups and design testing, but do not include in a future indexing batch unless the keyword and product positioning are revisited.
